aboutDescription:
## About Dr. Copilot

Dr. Copilot is a comprehensive clinic management application designed to streamline your practice's operations. Our mission is to empower healthcare professionals with the tools they need to provide the best possible care to their patients.

### Key Features:

* **Patient Management:** Keep track of all your patient records in one secure place.
* **Appointment Scheduling:** Easily schedule and manage appointments.
* **Billing and Invoicing:** Simplify your billing process with our integrated financial tools.
* **Clinical Reports:** Generate and manage clinical reports with ease.
* **AI-Powered Assistant:** Leverage the power of AI to assist with various tasks.

helpSupportContent:
## Help & Support

We are here to help you with any questions or issues you may have. Please feel free to reach out to us through any of the following channels:

* **Email:** [support@drcopilot.com](mailto:support@drcopilot.com)
* **Phone:** +1 (800) 123-4567

### Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)

**Q: How do I reset my password?**

A: You can reset your password by going to the 'Account' page and clicking on the 'Forgot Password' link.

**Q: How do I add a new patient?**

A: You can add a new patient by navigating to the 'Patients' section and clicking on the 'Add Patient' button.
informationCollectionDescription: We collect information that you provide to us directly, such as when you create an account, update your profile, or use our services. This may include personal information such as your name, email address, and phone number.
informationUseDescription: We use the information we collect to provide, maintain, and improve our services. This includes using your information to communicate with you, personalize your experience, and ensure the security of your data.

privacyDescription: At Dr. Copilot, we take your privacy seriously. This privacy policy outlines the types of information we collect, how we use it, and the measures we take to protect your data.
privacyPolicyDescription:
## Privacy Policy

Your privacy is important to us. It is Dr. Copilot's policy to respect your privacy regarding any information we may collect from you across our application.

### Information We Collect

We only ask for personal information when we truly need it to provide a service to you. We collect it by fair and lawful means, with your knowledge and consent. We also let you know why we’re collecting it and how it will be used.

### How We Use Your Information

We use the information we collect in various ways, including to:

* Provide, operate, and maintain our application
* Improve, personalize, and expand our application
* Understand and analyze how you use our application
* Develop new products, services, features, and functionality
* Communicate with you, either directly or through one of our partners, including for customer service, to provide you with updates and other information relating to the application, and for marketing and promotional purposes
* Send you emails
* Find and prevent fraud

### Security

We value your trust in providing us your Personal Information, thus we are striving to use commercially acceptable means of protecting it. But remember that no method of transmission over the internet, or method of electronic storage is 100% secure and reliable, and we cannot guarantee its absolute security.

aboutMission: Dr. Copilot is a comprehensive clinic management application designed to streamline your practice's operations and empower healthcare professionals with cutting-edge tools. Our mission is to provide the best possible care to patients through innovative technology and seamless workflow integration.
featurePatientManagementDesc: Keep track of all your patient records in one secure, centralized location. Manage patient demographics, medical history, and treatment plans with ease.
featureAppointmentsDesc: Easily schedule and manage appointments with an integrated calendar system. Set reminders, track attendance, and optimize your clinic's schedule.
featureBillingDesc: Simplify your billing process with integrated financial tools. Generate invoices, track payments, manage bills, and monitor revenue streams effortlessly.
featureClinicalReportsDesc: Create, manage, and export professional clinical reports. Integrate with Google Drive for seamless document storage and sharing.
featureAiAssistantDesc: Leverage advanced AI models (Gemini, GPT, Claude) to assist with documentation, patient insights, and clinical decision support.
featureTeamChatDesc: Built-in messaging system for clinic staff, doctors, and admins. Create teams, share updates, and maintain seamless communication.
featureFinancialsDesc: Track revenue, expenses, and financial goals with comprehensive analytics. Visualize trends with charts and make data-driven decisions.
featureIntegrationsDesc: Seamlessly integrate with Google Drive, Google Calendar, and other cloud services for enhanced productivity and data accessibility.

faqInviteStaff: How do I invite staff members?
faqInviteStaffAns: Team management is available on Pro and Elite plans. Once upgraded, navigate to the Teams section to invite doctors and staff members.
faqFreePlanLimits: What are the limits of the Free plan?
faqFreePlanLimitsAns: The Free plan includes 50 patients, 50 monthly sessions, and 5 daily AI interactions. It does not include cloud backup or team features.
faqExportData: How can I export my data?
faqExportDataAns: Go to Settings → Data & Storage → Export My Data. This feature is available for Pro and Elite subscribers to download a JSON backup.
faqSwitchAIAns: Yes! Go to Settings → Model Selection to choose between Gemini, GPT-4, and Claude models based on your preference.
faqCreateReport: How do I create a clinical report?
faqCreateReportAns: Navigate to the Clinical Reports section, click the '+' button, select a patient, and you can either write manually or use the AI Copilot to generate it.
faqManageSubscription: Where can I manage my subscription?
faqManageSubscriptionAns: You can upgrade or manage your current plan preferences in Settings → Subscription.
faqDataBackupAns: Cloud backup and synchronization across devices are premium features available on the Pro and Elite plans.
